name: safety-schemas
documentation:
# safety_schemas
Models and schemas used by Safety.

classes.name: safety_schemas.models.metadata.MetadataModel
documentation: Main data about the report, used for traceability purposes.

classes.name: safety_schemas.models.telemetry.TelemetryModel
documentation:
Telemetry object generated per Safety report; this model holds data related to the
client application running Safety CLI.

classes.name: safety_schemas.models.scan.ReportModel
documentation:
Used as an entrypoint to keep backwards compatibility with old formats.
Use this model if you want to generate a standard JSON report.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.PackageEcosystem
documentation: Defines the package ecosystem for installation.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.PackageDefinition
documentation: Represents a package and its specifications in the ecosystem.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.DeniedPackageCriteria
documentation: Criteria for denying packages based on certain properties.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.DeniedVulnerabilityCriteria
documentation: Criteria for denying vulnerabilities based on severity.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.DeniedPackage
documentation: Defines the conditions under which a package should be denied.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.DeniedVulnerability
documentation: Defines the conditions under which vulnerabilities should be denied.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.AllowedInstallation
documentation: Represents the list of allowed packages and vulnerabilities.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.DeniedInstallation
documentation: Represents the list of denied packages and vulnerabilities.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.Installation
documentation: Installation configuration including logging, allowed, and denied lists.

classes.name: safety_schemas.config.schemas.v3_0.main.Config
documentation: Main configuration schema for Safety policy.

classes.name: safety_schemas.report.schemas.v3_0.main.Telemetry
documentation:
Telemetry object generated per Safety report; this model holds data related to the
client application running Safety CLI.

params.name: Field(..., description="Only exported when the vulnerability is " "ignored")

Field(
        ...,
        description="The full path of the file in the host machine.",
        examples=["/Development/pyupio"],
        title="Location",
    )

Field(
        ...,
        description="Absolute path from where the scan was ran.",
        examples=["/full-path"],
    )

Field(
        ...,
        description="Indicate whether the scan report was ran by an "
        "authenticated session. This is true if any "
        "authentication method like token or api_key was used.",
        examples=[True, False],
    )

Field(
        ...,
        description="Array of files found in an environment "
        "scan with at least one finding of any type.",
        title="Files",
    )

Field(
        ...,
        description="This list all the projects found with "
        "its respective files or env results.",
        title="Projects",
    )

Field(
        ...,
        description="Represents general data about the scan "
        "executed in the target host.",
        examples=["TODO, PENDING to add examples"],
        title="Metadata",
    )
